case_title: PALMER, ERIC VS POLLACK, JEFFERY / JULUIS CASTLE INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POLLACK, JEFFERY / JULUIS CASTLE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY PALMER, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT POLLACK, JEFFERY / JULUIS CASTLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT POLLACK, JEFFERY / JULUIS CASTLE INC. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
